label: Antigravity
description: Google's IDE coding engine via opencode-antigravity-auth. Access Gemini 3 Pro, Gemini 3 Flash, Claude Opus 4.6 Thinking, and Claude Sonnet 4.6 using your Google OAuth credentials — free quota, no API key needed. Runs as an OpenCode provider variant.
installCmd: npm install -g opencode-ai && npx opencode-antigravity-auth@latest install
authNote: Requires opencode-antigravity-auth plugin. Run `opencode auth login` once to authenticate with Google OAuth. No API key needed — uses Antigravity free quota (Gemini 3 Pro, Claude Opus 4.6).
traits: Free quota via Google OAuth — no API key required
Gemini 3 Pro (1M context) + Claude Opus 4.6 Thinking
Dual quota pool: Antigravity + Gemini CLI (auto-rotates)
Multi-account support — add accounts for higher combined limits
setupSteps: Authenticate: opencode auth login → choose Login with Google
